printed.name: Pike Front
printed.setup: Standing on pedal facing Wunda Chair, legs straight, hip width apart, feet plantarflexed, arms straight, shoulders over wrists, hands placed on outside of back edge of chair, trunk rounded

movement.inhale: Lower body, pressing pedal down (without touching bottom)

cues: Keep shoulders over wrists, avoid shoulders moving forward
Keep head aligned with spine, eyes directed toward body
